---
title: "Pharmaceutial"
listing: 
  id: listing-regulatory
  contents: 
    - listings/regulatory.yml
metadata-files: 
  - listings/_metadata_regulatory.yml
---

{{< include _listing-preamble.qmd >}}

### Regulatory {.unlisted}

::: {#listing-regulatory .column-body-outset-right}
:::

{{< include _listing-footer.qmd >}}
